UCS-25  DESIGN STRESS INTENSITY VALUES. (a) Stress intensity values for carbon and low alloy steels, when required by the design-by-analysis methods, shall be obtained from the tables of this paragraph. (b) The stress intensity values shall not exceed the limits established in UG-23. (c) Stress analysis shall consider all loadings specified in UG-22. For design-by-rule methods, the allowable stress values of UCS-23 shall be used. Wall thickness shall be determined in accordance with UG-27 or UG-28. See also UCS-100 for general carbon steel material requirements.
